zh.Little Pashley,Ticehurst, Sussex, Englan: 英國英格蘭素可迪胡爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate於大約1317年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，他的父親Sir Edmund de Passele49歲，母親Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington37歲。他於大約1339年與Joan de Etchingham在英國素可艾欽加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1362年在英國素可費艾利特享年46歲。

zh-hans.Little Pashley,Ticehurst, Sussex, Englan: 英国英格兰素可迪胡爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate于大约1317年出生在英国英格兰肯特时，他的父亲Sir Edmund de Passele49岁，母亲Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington37岁。他于大约1339年与Joan de Etchingham在英国素可艾欽加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1362年在英国素可費艾利特享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pashley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French passe lewe ‘cross the water’, probably used for a seafarer or sailor. Compare Parslow . The name was sometimes treated like a Norman habitational name by adding the preposition de, although no such placename has been identified in Normandy or neighboring regions.

habitational name from Pashley in the parish of Ticehurst, Sussex. The placename is from Old English Pæcces + lēah ‘Pæcca's wood or clearing’. A district of Eastbourne, Sussex, bearing this name derives it from the surname; a family called Pashley had moved there from Ticehurst by the later part of the 13th century.

variants.name: Parslow
meanings: English: Anglicized form of the Old French nickname passe lewe ‘cross the water’; see Pashley .

variants.name: Pasley
meanings: Scottish: variant of Paisley . Black suggests also that some examples of Pasley and Paisley may be derived from a place known as Pasley or Howpasley, in the Borders region.
Possibly an altered form of German Pasler, a variant of Basler , or of Pässler, an occupational name, from an agent derivative of basteln ‘to do handicraft’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate was born about 1317, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edmund de Passele, was 49 and his mother, Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington, was 37. He married Joan de Etchingham about 1339, in Etchingham, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1362, in Fairlight, Sussex, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate est né environ 1317, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edmund de Passele, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Joan d’Etchingham environ 1339, à Etchingham, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1362, à Fairlight, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate um 1317 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund de Passele 49 und seine Mutter Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington 37. Er hat um 1339 in Etchingham, Sussex, England Joan de Etchingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1362 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Fairlight, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate è nato il circa 1317 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Edmund de Passele, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Etchingham circa 1339, nel Etchingham, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1362, nel Fairlight, Sussex, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate(이)가 대략 1317년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund de Passele(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1339년 영국 수세스 트친그함에서 Joan de Etchingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1362년 영국 수세스 파어라이트에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate nasceu aproximadamente 1317, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edmund de Passele, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Etchingham aproximadamente 1339, em Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1362, em Fairlight, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate родился около 1317 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edmund de Passele было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Etchingham около 1339 г. в местности эчингхам, суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1362 г. в местности феирлаит, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert I Pashley Lord of Thevegate nació aproximadamente 1317, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Edmund de Passele, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Margaret de Normanville Lady Kenardington, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Joan de Etchingham aproximadamente 1339, en Etchingham, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1362, en Fairlight, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años.
